description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.5-jdk-8-slim Docker image, sets MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables, and caches the local Maven repository at .m2/repository. In the 📦 build stage add a build-jar job that runs `mvn package`. In the 🚀 deploy stage add a deploy-artifact job that runs `mvn package` and uploads the target/* directory as an artifact, and a deploy-maven job that runs only on the master branch, copies ci_settings.xml to /root/.m2/settings.xml, replaces CI_JOB_TOKEN and PROJECT_ID placeholders with the CI variables, then executes `mvn deploy` to publish to a Maven repository. In the 💻 integration-test stage add an int-tests job that runs `mvn integration-test`. In the ✅ unit-test stage add a run-mvn-test job that runs `mvn test`.
